title: Xtra Silky Indian Cucumber Bowl
description: A light and refreshing Indian dish featuring persian cucumber, with a silky texture and earthy flavors, served in a dolsot stone bowl.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the yogurt, lemon juice, ghee, cumin seeds, coriander powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sodium alginate and water to create a spherification bath.
Add the sliced cucumber to the spherification bath and let it sit for 30 minutes to allow the sodium alginate to take effect.
Remove the cucumber slices from the bath and rinse them gently with cold water.
In a dolsot stone bowl, arrange the cucumber slices in a decorative pattern.
Spoon the yogurt mixture over the cucumber slices, making sure to cover them evenly.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
To enhance the presentation, add a few spherified cucumber balls to the bowl, if desired.
Let the dish sit at room temperature for 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
